violations.text: Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the backroom. Single service items to be stored 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023

Sandwich cooler was not in good repair, not maintaining proper temperatures to hold TCS/PHF foods. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. Per PIC, service ticket is in place to repair equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the microwave and bottom shelves of storage cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023

Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and debris. An area for refuse, returnables and recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

The following areas were observed with an accumulation of soil residue: 1. fanguards in the walk-in cooler 2. floors in back storage room 3. floors under equipment and shelves 4. mopsink area The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
